name_cn:
Black Lambskin with Gold Hardware · 26cm
The most elegant Sac de Day series, a timeless classic. Exquisite lambskin leather with clear texture and a rich luster, very luxurious! Comes with a middle divider inside, can be removed to use as a clutch. The strap is adjustable, choose the length you prefer. The logo is very small, perfectly embodying the style of understated luxury~
Model: 421863/477477
Size: 26x20.5x12.5cm
(Comes with a middle divider inside)
